steps: Go to https://app.segment.com and log in to your Segment workspace
Enter a description for the token
Assign the access level: 'Workspace Owner' or 'Workspace Member'
Copy the token immediately and store it securely

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Public API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Segment Public API token. Used as a Basic auth credential (base64-encoded as the username with no password).

notes: The Public API (api.segmentapis.com) requires a Workspace Owner token to create and manage resources
The tracking API (api.segment.io) uses a Source Write Key, not this token — find it in your Source settings
Public API access is available on Team and Business tier plans
Only Workspace Owners can create Public API tokens
The token is shown only once — copy it before clicking Done

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve workspace information to verify the token is valid
